# VaultLine Zapier Workflows

Four production-ready Zap patterns covering the full customer lifecycle.

---

## Zap 1 — Onboarding (New Audit Lead)

```
TRIGGER : VaultLine → New Audit Lead
    │
    ├─ ACTION  HubSpot    → Create/Update Contact  (email, name, chamberSize → lifecycle stage: Lead)
    ├─ ACTION  Slack       → Post to #new-leads     ("🔍 New audit: {{name}} <{{email}}> · {{chamberSize}} barristers")
    ├─ ACTION  Mailchimp   → Add to "Audit Leads" audience + tag with painPoints
    └─ ACTION  Google Sheets → Append row (date, email, name, chamberSize, painPoints)
```

---

## Zap 2 — Demo Lead Routing (New Demo Lead)

```
TRIGGER : VaultLine → New Demo Lead
    │
    ├─ ACTION  Pipedrive   → Create Deal  (title: "{{company}} — {{product}}", value: 2500)
    ├─ ACTION  Slack       → Post to #demos  ("📅 Demo booked: {{name}} @ {{company}} for {{product}}")
    └─ ACTION  Calendly    → Send scheduling link email to {{email}}
```

---

## Zap 3 — Escalation Alert (Deal Escalated)

```
TRIGGER : VaultLine → Deal Escalated
    │
    ├─ ACTION  Slack       → DM @sales-lead  ("🚨 ESCALATION: {{email}}\nReason: {{reason}}\nValue: £{{priceMonthly}}/mo")
    ├─ ACTION  ClickUp     → Create Task    (name: "Escalated: {{email}}", priority: urgent, due: today+1d)
    └─ ACTION  HubSpot     → Update Contact (lifecycle stage: Sales Qualified Lead, note: {{reason}})
```

---

## Zap 4 — Closed Won (Deal Closed)

```
TRIGGER : VaultLine → Deal Closed (Won)
    │
    ├─ ACTION  Stripe      → Create Customer + Subscription (price: £{{priceMonthly}}/mo)
    ├─ ACTION  Slack       → Post to #wins  ("🎉 Closed! {{email}} · £{{priceMonthly}}/mo")
    ├─ ACTION  HubSpot     → Update Contact (lifecycle stage: Customer)
    ├─ ACTION  Google Sheets → Append to MRR tracker
    └─ ACTION  Gmail       → Send welcome email template
```

---

## Bonus — Inbound Actions from Other Tools

### Typeform / Tally → VaultLine Audit
```
TRIGGER : Typeform → New Submission
ACTION  : VaultLine → Trigger Revenue Audit  (email from form → VaultLine audit funnel)
```

### HubSpot Deal Stage → VaultLine Lead
```
TRIGGER : HubSpot → Deal Stage Changed to "Demo Booked"
ACTION  : VaultLine → Create Demo Lead
```

---

## REST Hook Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| POST | `/api/zapier/subscribe` | Register Zapier webhook |
| DELETE | `/api/zapier/subscribe` | Deregister Zapier webhook |
| GET | `/api/zapier/sample/:event` | Return sample payload for Zap builder |
| GET | `/api/zapier/subscriptions` | Admin — list active subs |

## Auth
All endpoints require `X-API-Key: <ZAPIER_API_KEY>` header.

## Events
| Event | Fired when |
|-------|-----------|
| `new_audit_lead` | `/api/audit-signup` completes |
| `new_lead` | `/api/lead` completes |
| `deal_escalated` | Sales agent returns `action: escalate` |
| `deal_closed` | Sales agent returns `action: close` (live mode) |

name: Deploy Production Stack

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        default: 'aios'
        type: string

env:
  ENVIRONMENT_NAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'aios' }}
  RESOURCE_GROUP: rg-aios

jobs:
  # ============================================================
  # Build & push Docker image to ACR
  # ============================================================
  build:
    name: Build & Push Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      image_tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to Azure Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}
          username: ${{ secrets.ACR_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.ACR_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Extract Docker metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/vaultline-api
          tags: |
            type=sha,format=short
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' }}

      - name: Build and push
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          file: ./Dockerfile
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  # ============================================================
  # Deploy infrastructure via Bicep
  # ============================================================
  infra:
    name: Deploy Infrastructure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log in to Azure
        uses: azure/login@v2
        with:
          creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

      - name: Ensure resource group exists
        run: |
          az group create \
            --name ${{ env.RESOURCE_GROUP }} \
            --location uksouth \
            --output none

      - name: Deploy Bicep
        uses: azure/arm-deploy@v2
        with:
          subscriptionId: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}
          resourceGroupName: ${{ env.RESOURCE_GROUP }}
          template: ./infra/main.bicep
          parameters: >
            environmentName=${{ env.ENVIRONMENT_NAME }}
            acrLoginServer=${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}
            dbPassword=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}
            openaiKey=${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
            resendKey=${{ secrets.RESEND_KEY }}
            stripeSecretKey=${{ secrets.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY }}
          failOnStdErr: false

  # ============================================================
  # Update Container App with new image
  # ============================================================
  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Container App
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, infra]
    environment: production

    steps:
      - name: Log in to Azure
        uses: azure/login@v2
        with:
          creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

      - name: Update Container App image
        run: |
          az containerapp update \
            --name api-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT_NAME }} \
            --resource-group ${{ env.RESOURCE_GROUP }} \
            --image ${{ secrets.ACR_LOGIN_SERVER }}/vaultline-api:sha-${{ github.sha }} \
            --output none

      - name: Wait for revision to stabilize
        run: |
          az containerapp revision list \
            --name api-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT_NAME }} \
            --resource-group ${{ env.RESOURCE_GROUP }} \
            --query "[0].properties.healthState" \
            --output tsv

      - name: Record deployment
        run: |
          API_URL=$(az containerapp show \
            --name api-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT_NAME }} \
            --resource-group ${{ env.RESOURCE_GROUP }} \
            --query "properties.configuration.ingress.fqdn" \
            --output tsv)

          curl -s -X POST "https://${API_URL}/api/deployments/record" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "X-DEPLOY-TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_RECORD_TOKEN }}" \
            -d '{
              "environment": "prod",
              "status": "success",
              "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
              "workflowRun": "${{ github.run_id }}"
            }' || true

# Builder stage — compiles both frontend (Vite) and server (tsc)
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci; else npm install; fi
COPY . .
# Build frontend assets into dist/
RUN npm run build
# Compile server TypeScript into dist-server/
RUN npx tsc --project tsconfig.server.json

# Runtime stage
FROM node:20-alpine AS runtime
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --omit=dev; else npm install --omit=dev; fi
# Frontend static assets
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
# Compiled server JS
COPY --from=builder /app/dist-server ./dist-server
USER node
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "dist-server/server/index.js"]

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "lib": ["ES2020"],
    "outDir": "dist-server",
    "rootDir": ".",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "strict": false,
    "noEmit": false
  },
  "include": ["server/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "src", "dist"]
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "types": ["vite/client"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": false,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["src"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "server"]
}

{
  "name": "vaultline-brand-suite",

    "dev": "vite",

    "server:watch": "tsx watch server/index.ts",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:push": "drizzle-kit push",
    "db:studio": "drizzle-kit studio",
    "db:migrate": "tsx server/db/migrate.ts",

    "lint": "eslint . --ext ts,tsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0",
    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@radix-ui/react-label": "^2.1.8",
    "@radix-ui/react-select": "^2.2.6",
    "@radix-ui/react-slot": "^1.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-tabs": "^1.1.13",

    "express": "^4.18.2",
    "lucide-react": "^1.7.0",
    "node-fetch": "^3.3.2",
    "openai": "^6.34.0",
    "postgres": "^3.4.3",
    "react": "^18.3.1",
    "react-dom": "^18.3.1",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.22.0",
    "sonner": "^2.0.7",
    "stripe": "^14.21.0",
    "tailwind-merge": "^3.5.0",
    "tsx": "^4.7.0",
    "uuid": "^9.0.1",
    "wouter": "^3.9.0",
    "zapier-platform-core": "^18.5.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/node": "^20.11.5",
    "@types/react": "^18.3.3",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.3.0",
    "@types/uuid": "^9.0.7",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.2.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.2.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17",
    "drizzle-kit": "^0.20.10",
    "eslint": "^8.57.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^4.6.0",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.6",
    "postcss": "^8.4.35",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1",
    "tsx": "^4.7.0",
    "typescript": "^5.2.2",
    "vite": "^5.2.0"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0",
    "pnpm": ">=8.0.0"
  }
}

# Database Configuration
# PostgreSQL connection string
# Format: postgresql://username:password@host:port/database?sslmode=require
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/vaultline_db"

# Deployment Recording Token
# Used to authenticate deployment recording requests from GitHub Actions
# Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
DEPLOY_RECORD_TOKEN="your-secure-token-here"

# Server Configuration
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=development

# Companies House API Key
# REQUIRED for FineGuard compliance checking
# Get your FREE API key at: https://developer.company-information.service.gov.uk/
# Sign up, create an application, and copy your API key
COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY="your-companies-house-api-key-here"

# App base URL (used in email links)
APP_URL="https://your-app.azurecontainerapps.io"

# Stripe (existing)
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY="sk_live_..."
STRIPE_PRICE_ID="price_..."
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET="whsec_..."

# OpenAI (sales agent)
OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."

# Resend (transactional email)
RESEND_KEY="re_..."
EMAIL_FROM="audit@yourdomain.co.uk"

# Sales agent mode: "shadow" (log only) | "live" (send emails & act)
AGENT_MODE="shadow"

# Zapier Integration
# API key Zapier uses to authenticate against /api/zapier/* endpoints
# Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
ZAPIER_API_KEY="your-zapier-api-key-here"

# Azure Container Registry (CI/CD)
# ACR_LOGIN_SERVER="youracr.azurecr.io"
# ACR_USERNAME="..."
# ACR_PASSWORD="..."

# Azure deployment
# AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID="..."
# DB_PASSWORD="..."  (used by Bicep, keep out of app .env)
